CE1.justification: Acted directly on the request by responding with a grounded counter-position without asking the user to look anything up or restate context.

CE2.justification: The five-point enumerated rebuttal plus a closing offer is several stretches longer than needed; a tighter version could name the counter-position in two or three sentences.

CE3.justification: Clearly signaled that no files were modified and named decisions.md as the appropriate destination for any change, with the why stated in-line.

CE4.justification: No actions were taken and no in-progress artifacts were left behind, so an interruption leaves a clean state.
